templates.name: Where is my money going? Where are you donating to?
templates.content: Great question - for each of our collections, we find partners who are working to create systems-based change in the communities that we share. Our most recent charity partners include Feeding America to whom we donated over 200,000 meals to help fight hunger during COVID-19. We are also working with Selena Gomez - for every purchase made from our collaborative collection we're donating 10% of the profits to the Rare Impact Fund!

templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content: We have a reward program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here - https://fromourplace.com/pages/dirty-dishes-club

templates.name: I entered the wrong shipping address? What should I do?
templates.content: You're able to cancel your order within 60 minutes via a link at the bottom of your order confirmation email. From there, just place a new order so we can get that heading to the right place! If you have a one time promo code, just drop us a note after your new order is placed and we can credit you retroactively.

templates.name: My Tableware has a few scratches, what can be done?
templates.content: Ceramics are susceptible to markings as a result of using flatware. When forks and knives are used, a surface level residue can sometimes be left behind. Not to worry though, it is removable. We recommend using Bon Ami after cleaning and a little polish if you're still seeing stray marks. That should usually do the trick!

templates.name: My item arrived damaged. What should I do?
templates.content: Well, that's a bummer - we're so sorry that happened. Please follow this link: https://returns.fromourplace.com/#/ and we'll get you a replacement on the way ASAP. Please select "Delivery Issue" for your return reason so we can be sure to share this feedback with the appropriate teams.

templates.name: Can I place my Tableware in the fridge or freezer?
templates.content: All of our Tableware will do fine in the fridge, but please be careful if placing any items in the freezer as extreme temperature changes can create cracks in the stoneware. While it is freezer-friendly, do not move directly from the freezer to the oven or vice versa.

templates.name: Is it safe to put my Dream Cooker on the counter? Does it need a mat?
templates.content: Yes, it is safe, but we recommend the following: Avoid placing it near countertop edges during cooking. Always use it on a flat, stable, heat-resistant surface, away from heat sources and liquids. After cooking, place the inner cooking pot on a heat-resistant surface to prevent countertop damage from residual heat. While not mandatory, a heat-resistant mat can provide extra protection and style. Make sure your Dream Cooker has clearance of at least 5 inches above and at least 3 inches on all sides to ensure airflow.

templates.name: Is your Tableware dishwasher safe?
templates.content: It is! While our cookware should be hand-washed, our Tableware is able to be used in the dishwasher so snag a second serving of your meal and just give it a quick rinse to remove any leftovers. You're one step closer to your next meal!

templates.name: My order says it was delivered but I didn’t receive anything
templates.content: In most cases, you'll see it delivered within 1 business day. There can be a lag between the physical delivery date and tracking delivery date. If it's been longer than 2 business days, please email us at hello@fromourplace.com and we'll look into what's going on!

templates.name: Is your cookware induction friendly?
templates.content: Yes! All our cookware* is induction-friendly. We recommend always using the smallest burner that will fit the bottom ring of the item. Usually, we have found that if there is a connection issue, a smaller burner will do the trick. The only exception is our dual-purpose Oven Pan. While it is friendly for the oven, the stove-top griddle capabilities are not induction friendly.

templates.name: When is my anniversary?
templates.content: The anniversary is the day you created your account. When logged in just click on "rewards history" and scroll to the bottom to see the date your account was created. Easy as cooking in an Always Pan!

templates.name: Where are your items made / manufactured?
templates.content: All our products are designed in LA and are made in small artisan workshops to third-generation businesses creating dignified work for hundreds of people, our partners come from all over the world. You can find more about them here: https://fromourplace.com/blogs/magazine/made-for-our-place

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: You're able to click "Edit or Cancel" on your order confirmation within 60 minutes of your order being placed. This will cancel your order so you can place a new one. If you've passed that time window, the best way to handle this is to email us directly at hello@fromourplace.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://fromourplace.com/pages/returns

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at hello@fromourplace.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us at a store near you here: https://fromourplace.com/pages/retail

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/ourplace/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/fromourplace

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes up to 2 business days. Once shipped it will take 1-7 business days for delivery.

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping to orders over $50 in value after discounts and before taxes in the 48 contiguous states and this does not apply to Hawaii, Alaska, or Puerto Rico. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: We don't offer phone support right now but I'd be happy to help you over text, let me know what I can do for you!

templates.name: What are the care instructions for your nonstick products (Always Pan, Perfect Pot, etc)?
templates.content: Great question! In general we recommend using high smoke-point oils, avoiding aerosol cooking sprays, using low to medium heat and avoiding extreme temperature changes (think a hot pan being put under cool water immediately after cooking). Always hand wash, too! For more instructions please check here: https://fromourplace.com/pages/faqs?a=What-are-the-care-instructions-for-your-nonstick-products-(Always-Pan-Perfect-Pot-etc)---id--fhIq5y-STqSPcoEmdRFUVA

templates.name: Do I have to pay return shipping?
templates.content: Nope! Returns are always free when returning to the same country that you purchased. Please note if you leave the country with your item, we are not able to provide a return label across borders.

templates.name: Can I purchase a gift card?
templates.content:
Of course! You can snag a gift card in various denominations here: https://fromourplace.com/products/gift-card?variant=39585539424450 . You're able to either have that sent to your recipient now or at a later date.
If helpful, you can find our terms and conditions here: https://fromourplace.com/pages/program-specific-terms#gc-terms-and-conditions

templates.name: How do I unsubscribe from your mailing list?
templates.content: All of our emails have an "unsubscribe" link at the bottom. You can either unsubscribe or modify your preferences to receive just the most important updates. You can also email us with the subject line "Unsubscribe" and we'll be happy to help.

templates.name: What are the care instructions for your cast iron products? (Cast Iron Always Pan, Cast Iron Perfect Pot, Tiny Cast Iron + Hot Grill)
templates.content:
To clean your cast iron, stick to hand-washing only to ensure your pan looks and functions its best. Please also dry immediately afterwards. Do not let it sit in soapy water, as this can damage the enameled cast iron coating. If your cast iron product has any cooked-on bits of food you'd like to remove, you can deglaze it by simmering water with baking soda and breaking up any stubborn bits with the beechwood spatula.
For more information please check here: https://fromourplace.com/pages/faqs?a=What-are-the-care-instructions-for-your-cast-iron-products---id--jrmVXzz3TwaQy7Uvmr873w

templates.name: What should I look for to know if it's time to replace my current kitchenware?
templates.content: If you're questioning "is this seasoning or the pan coating?" it's probably good you're here. We recommend giving your cookware a rigorous cleaning with non-abrasive scrubbers to see if that will do the trick and remove any residue. Check out the tips and tricks for our products - they may work for any products in your home, too! If you've still got residue after cleaning or some serious scratching on your cookware it may be time to update though a few scratches is okay and very normal.

templates.name: When are birthday points given?
templates.content: Your birthday points will be added on your birthday as long as you have entered it in! If you sign up and enter your birthday within the 30 days prior to your actual day of birth, you'll see the points added on a delay. They'll appear on the 31st day and then on your actual birthday from here on out!

templates.name: What payment methods do you accept?
templates.content: We accept all major bank cards, Our Place Gift Cards, PayPal, Apple Pay and Google Pay.

templates.name: Is your Tableware oven safe?
templates.content: It is! Our Tableware is microwave and oven-safe up to 350°F. Please use care when removing from either the microwave or the oven as they will be hot so oven mitts are recommended. We also caution against any extreme temperature changes so avoid moving directly from the fridge/freezer into the oven and vice versa.

templates.name: What are your sustainability practices?
templates.content: We know that what we make is connected to the health of the earth we share. That's why we invest in products made from thoughtful and responsible materials. Our glasses are made from a portion of recycled glass and natural sand. Our Always Pan is manufactured with 100% post-consumer recycled aluminum. Our packaging is free of traditional plastics, and innovatively designed to eliminate the need for a shipper box, and our box is fully recyclable and biodegradable. Our products are also intended to streamline your kitchen, and reduce the number of items you need to buy. These are just some of our initial sustainability practices, with many more in the works, and if you have any other suggestions for us, we'd love to hear them!

templates.name: What are your values and mission? What does your name mean?
templates.content: We believe in the power of home cooking to bring people together. We have an in-depth answer to this question here that does a great job speaking to who we are, what we value and the difference we aim to make.

templates.name: Warranty policy
templates.content: You can take a look at our full warranty policy here: https://fromourplace.com/pages/warranty

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that but if it helps, you can check out the items we have on sale here: https://fromourplace.com/collections/sale?filter.v.m.collection.name=Sale

templates.name: How do I start a return?
templates.content: You can start your return here: https://ourplace.attn.tv/aGRS81kejjwE/#/
